hero.headline: Custom CNC Parts Manufacturing:
hero.description: I manufacture precision CNC parts from drawings, 3D models, or samples. From one-off prototypes to small batch production - fast, accurate, and reliable. Tight tolerances, complex geometries, and professional finishing.
hero.hint1: Send 3D models, drawings, sketches — or ask any questions.

services.heading: CNC Machining Services for Custom Parts
services.description: Manufacturing custom parts from drawings, CAD models, or physical samples using metals and engineering plastics.

milling.title: Precision 3-Axis CNC Milling
milling.alt: CNC milling machine cutting a metal part
milling.description: CNC milling of complex parts, housings, brackets, and custom components for mechanical applications. Suitable for prototypes and small batch production.

turning.title: High-Accuracy Lathe Turning
turning.alt: Lathe machine turning a cylindrical metal part
turning.description: Precision turning of cylindrical parts such as shafts, bushings, and mechanical components with high surface quality and tight tolerances.

reverseEngineering.title: Reverse Engineering & CAD Modeling
reverseEngineering.alt: CAD model of a mechanical part for reverse engineering
reverseEngineering.description: Recreating accurate CAD models from physical samples, broken parts, or sketches to manufacture fully functional replacements.

services.materialsNote: These are the most commonly used materials.
services.materialsNoteCta: Send your requirements — I'll confirm availability and recommend the right grade for your application.
services.isoNote: Machining according to ISO · Tolerances up to 0.01 mm

workflow.heading: From Idea to Delivery
workflow.description: A clear, repeatable process — from your first file to the finished part at your door.

step1.title: Technical Consultation & Analysis
step1.description: Send your files or sketch. I review the design to confirm the part can be produced efficiently and to spec.

step2.title: Engineering & Modeling
step2.description: No drawing? I build a precise 3D model from your sample or sketch, then select the optimal toolpath and strategy for your material.

step3.title: Precision Manufacturing
step3.description: Machined in my Latvia facility on 3-axis CNC centers. {{years}}+ years of experience — I personally oversee every program to hold tolerances up to ±0.01 mm.

step4.title: Finishing & Quality Control
step4.description: Deburring or engraving as required. Every part is measured and verified against your drawing before shipping.

step5.title: Secure Delivery
step5.description: Parts are packed to prevent transit damage and shipped locally or internationally — ready to use on arrival.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about ordering custom CNC parts, materials, and delivery.
faq.q1: What can I order from you?
faq.a1: You can order custom CNC machined parts based on your drawing, 3D model, or even a sample. I manufacture one-off prototypes as well as small and medium production batches for various industries.
faq.q2: Can you make a part from a sample or sketch?
faq.a2: Yes. I can manufacture parts from a physical sample, a broken component, or even a hand-drawn sketch. I'll create a precise 3D model before production.
faq.q3: What if I don't know the material or technical details?
faq.a3: If you're not sure about the material or technical details — no problem. Just send what you have, and I'll help you find the best solution.
faq.a4: There is no minimum order. You can order a single prototype or a small batch — I work with both individual and business clients.
faq.a5: I mainly work with aluminum, steel, and plastics, which cover most custom part orders. I can also machine other materials on request — just send your project details, and I'll confirm the best option.
faq.q6: How fast can you make my part?
faq.a6: Production time depends on current workload, part complexity, and order volume. For accurate timelines, please contact me directly with your project details.
faq.q7: How do I get a quote?
faq.a7: To get a quote, simply send your drawing, 3D file, or even a photo of the part. I'll review it and provide pricing and production details. Pricing is negotiable depending on order volume and complexity. You can reach me by email at {{email}} or via WhatsApp/Phone at {{phone}}.
faq.q8: Do you work with clients outside Latvia?
faq.a8: Yes, I work with clients across Europe and worldwide. I handle secure packaging and shipping for all orders.

cta.heading: Ready to start your custom project?
cta.description: Get a technical consultation directly from the lead engineer. I personally review every drawing to ensure 100% manufacturability and precision. No managers, no delays - just professional CNC solutions.

founder.title: Senior CNC Engineer & Founder of {{appName}}
founder.bio1: With over {{years}} years of experience in high-precision CNC milling and turning, I provide professional CNC machining services in Latvia for clients worldwide. I specialize in manufacturing mechanical parts from CAD models, technical drawings, sketches, and physical samples.
founder.bio2: My work focuses on 3-axis CNC machining, precision turning, and reverse engineering — for prototypes, one-off parts, and small batch production. I deliver fully finished components with tight tolerances up to 0.01mm, suitable for industrial, mechanical, and engineering applications.
founder.bio3: Based in Latvia, I support international clients with reliable production, fast communication, and engineering-level accuracy from concept to finished part. Every order is handled personally to ensure consistent quality and precise execution of technical requirements.
founder.stat1Label: Field Experience in CNC Machining & Manufacturing
founder.stat1Sub: Proven expertise in CNC milling, turning, and reverse engineering
founder.stat3Label: Precision Tolerance Standard for Critical Parts
founder.stat3Sub: High-accuracy machining for prototypes and functional components
founder.stat4Label: From CAD, drawings, sketches, or physical samples
founder.stat4Sub: One-off parts & small batch production available
founder.orderText: Send your CAD file, drawing, or sample — I will review it and provide a production quote.
founder.imgAlt: Viktor — Senior CNC Engineer & Founder of Viktor CNC, in a professional workshop environment

facility.heading: Production Facility — Precision You Can Rely On
facility.description: Located in Latvia, my workshop is optimized for high-precision custom orders. I combine industry-standard CNC machinery with specialized metrology tools to ensure every micron matches your blueprint.

unit1.label: High-Speed Milling
unit1.title: Precision CNC Milling — High Speed
unit1.description: CNC milling of aluminum and plastic parts at 24,000 RPM spindle speed — fine surface finish with tight dimensional tolerances.
unit1.alt: High-speed CNC milling center cutting aluminum parts at 24000 RPM

unit2.label: Primary Milling Unit
unit2.title: Precision 3-Axis CNC Milling
unit2.description: CNC milling of complex parts, housings, brackets, and custom components for mechanical applications. Suitable for prototypes and small batch production.
unit2.alt: Precision 3-axis CNC milling machine center for custom metal parts

unit3.label: Turning Department
unit3.title: High-Accuracy Lathe Turning
unit3.description: Precision turning of cylindrical parts such as shafts, bushings, and mechanical components with high surface quality and tight tolerances.
unit3.alt: Precision CNC lathe turning cylindrical metal shafts and bushings

facility.qcDescription: Every part is checked using precision measuring tools to ensure it matches your drawing exactly.
facility.qcNote: Parts are verified before delivery — no guesswork, only measured results.
facility.operatedDescription: All machines are set up, operated, and maintained by me personally. This ensures consistent quality and full control at every stage.

footer.description: Professional CNC machining, turning, and milling services in Latvia. Over {{years}} years of expertise in manufacturing custom components for global industries.
